plugins.name: example-github
plugins.description: Example MCP server requiring a personal access token. The marketplace never distributes credentials — installers replace the placeholder with their own.

plugins.name: example-weather
plugins.description: Example MCP server exposing current conditions and forecasts. Replace this entry with a real server, or delete it.

plugins.description: This server hosts a database of over 9000 geologic features of the moon

plugins.name: solar-system-api-server
plugins.description: Explore solar system data — search, filter, and analyze celestial bodies including planets, moons, asteroids, and comets, and calculate real-time positions of objects from any observer location.
